volumeTitle: See: Recognizing Narcissistic Manipulation in Relationships, Family, and Work
roundFocus: Top-to-bottom editorial review of the integrated book manuscript (post Round 5 + Round 6 + woven integration + appendix migration)
framingNote: Vol 1 is reviewed as a book in this round, not as a video course. Earlier rounds presupposed course/lesson products; Round 7 reads the prose as readers will encounter it.

1.name: Strategic Decisions
1.description: Big-picture structure, narrative arc, manuscript-level priorities, workflow coordination

diana.focus: Book-level structure, chapter sequencing, narrative arc, theme integrity, pacing

morgan.focus: Round 7 scope, sequencing across phases, conflict pre-resolution, decision routing

2.name: Content & Experience
2.description: Reader engagement, sensitivity validation, fact-checking. Runs after Phase 1 author decisions are recorded.

bailey.focus: Reader engagement, pacing perception, clarity, emotional impact

sage.focus: Validation pass against integrated cultural / LGBTQ+ / male-survivor weaving

felix.focus: Sources, claims, attributions, statistics, named patterns

3.name: Prose Polish
3.description: Line and copy editing. Runs after Phase 2 content changes are settled.

lyra.focus: Voice, rhythm, transitions, word choice, prose craft

cora.focus: Grammar, consistency, style sheet, internal continuity

4.name: Final
4.description: Final proofread before regenerating publication artifacts.

penny.focus: Typos, formatting, widows, orphans, final polish

round5.focus: Post-publication refinement; framed against course product

round6.focus: Sage sensitivity refresh on integrated woven prose
